クラス RoleAlignmentCalculator

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.RoleAlignmentCalculator
public class RoleAlignmentCalculator extends Object
Builds party-level role priors from static capability profiles and compares them against realized role usage from one episode rollout.

  • フィールドの概要

    Constructs a calculator backed by the default JSON profile store.

      関連項目:
      • 定数フィールド値

      private final ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore profileStore

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • RoleAlignmentCalculator

      public RoleAlignmentCalculator()
      Constructs a calculator backed by the default JSON profile store.

    • RoleAlignmentCalculator

      public RoleAlignmentCalculator(ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore profileStore)
      Constructs a calculator backed by the given profile store.
      パラメータ:
      profileStore - capability profile store (null falls back to an empty store)

  • メソッドの詳細

    • buildExpectedRoleVector

      public double[] buildExpectedRoleVector(CharacterId[] partyOrder)
      Builds the expected (prior) role share vector for the given party.
      パラメータ:
      partyOrder - ordered party slots
      戻り値:
      flattened expected role vector of length EpisodeRoleSummary.VECTOR_SIZE

    • summarize

      public EpisodeRoleSummary summarize(CharacterId[] partyOrder, CombatSimulator simulator, double[] slotOnFieldTime, double[] offFieldDamageBySlot, int[] swapInCounts, double[] stintTotalSecondsBySlot, int[] stintCountsBySlot, double episodeDurationSeconds)
      Produces an episode role summary comparing realized usage against the prior vector.
      パラメータ:
      partyOrder - ordered party slots
      simulator - simulator at episode end (used for damage totals)
      slotOnFieldTime - cumulative on-field time per slot
      offFieldDamageBySlot - off-field damage attributed to each slot
      swapInCounts - number of swap-in events per slot
      stintTotalSecondsBySlot - total stint seconds per slot
      stintCountsBySlot - number of stints per slot
      episodeDurationSeconds - total episode duration
      戻り値:
      populated EpisodeRoleSummary

    • buildRealizedRoleVector

      private double[] buildRealizedRoleVector(CharacterId[] partyOrder, CombatSimulator simulator, double[] slotOnFieldTime, double[] offFieldDamageBySlot, int[] swapInCounts, double[] stintTotalSecondsBySlot, int[] stintCountsBySlot, double episodeDurationSeconds)

    • featureAlignment

      private double featureAlignment(double[] expected, double[] realized, int featureIndex)

    • positive

      private static double positive(double value)

    • normalizeInPlace

      private static void normalizeInPlace(double[] values)

    • clamp01

      private static double clamp01(double value)
